description: The audit's explicit next priority. Diagnose and fix why V1E's THD-vs-frequency slope has the wrong sign: pedal THD rises 100->200->400Hz (4.5->10.5->22.3%) while the plugin's falls (5.9->3.6->0.9%). See ISS-001 for full diagnosis and untested candidates (twin-T notch depth/width upstream of clip; finite GBW; recovery LPF harmonic-dependent attenuation). Verify with: cmake --build build -j8 && python3.11 analysis/ab_report.py --filter V1E --os 4. Record the result (pass or fail) directly in docs/phase10-gap-audit.md per its own standing rule -- do not let the audit drift from the code.
title: Fix V1E THD-vs-frequency slope (gap A)
